## What changed?

<!-- A short summary of what this PR does. -->



## Why?

<!-- What problem does this solve or what feature does it add? Link to any issue or ticket if applicable. -->



## How was it tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified the changes work correctly. -->
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Manual walkthrough of affected screens

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling / dependency update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `style` — Formatting, no logic change
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is from `dev` (not `main`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): description`)
- [ ] No `.env.*` files committed
- [ ] No TypeScript `any` types introduced without justification
- [ ] If Firestore rules changed → deployed via `firebase deploy --only firestore:rules`
